examples.title: MVVM ViewModel Example
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a ViewModel with LiveData in Kotlin
examples.explanation: This ViewModel handles user data loading, manages UI state through LiveData, uses viewModelScope for coroutines, and separates loading, success, and error states.

examples.title: Repository Pattern Implementation
examples.description: Shows how to implement Repository pattern with local and remote data sources
examples.explanation: Repository handles data from multiple sources, implements cache-first strategy, syncs with remote API, and provides clean API to domain and presentation layers.
examples.timeComplexity: O(1) for cached data, O(n) for network fetch

examples.title: UseCase in Clean Architecture
examples.description: Demonstrates a UseCase class that encapsulates business logic
examples.explanation: UseCase contains single business responsibility, validates input, handles errors, maps data between layers, and is independent of Android framework.

examples.title: Room Database with DAO
examples.description: Shows Room database setup with DAO for local data persistence
examples.explanation: Room provides abstraction over SQLite, Entity defines table structure, DAO provides methods for database operations, and Database class manages the database instance.
examples.timeComplexity: O(1) for indexed queries, O(n) for full table scans
